blocks.code:
; EDIT YOUR_COMMANDS: e.g. (list "north" "take key" "east" "unlock")
(define YOUR_COMMANDS (list "north" "take key" "east"))

(define ROOMS (dict
  "start" (dict "desc" "A cold stone antechamber. Exits: north."
                "exits" (dict "north" "hall"))
  "hall" (dict "desc" "A long hall. A rusted key lies on the floor. Exits: south, east."
               "exits" (dict "south" "start" "east" "vault")
               "items" (list "key"))
  "vault" (dict "desc" "A locked vault door. Exits: west."
                "exits" (dict "west" "hall"))
  "treasure" (dict "desc" "🏆 YOU FOUND THE TREASURE. Game won."
                   "exits" (dict))))

(define (step state cmd)
  (define room (get state "room"))
  (define room-data (get ROOMS room))
  (define inv (or (get state "inv") (list)))
  (cond
    ((member? cmd (keys (or (get room-data "exits") (dict))))
     (dict "room" (get (get room-data "exits") cmd) "inv" inv "msg" (string-append "→ " cmd)))
    ((string-prefix? "take " cmd)
     (let ((item (substring cmd 5 (string-length cmd))))
       (dict "room" room "inv" (append inv (list item)) "msg" (string-append "Took " item))))
    ((and (= cmd "unlock") (= room "vault") (member? "key" inv))
     (dict "room" "treasure" "inv" inv "msg" "The key turns. The door opens."))
    (else (dict "room" room "inv" inv "msg" (string-append "Can't: " cmd)))))

(define state (dict "room" "start" "inv" (list)))
(define log (list))
(for-each (lambda (cmd)
  (set! state (step state cmd))
  (set! log (append log (list (string-append "[" (get state "room") "] " cmd " → " (get state "msg"))))))
  YOUR_COMMANDS)
(for-each println log)
(println "")
(println (string-append "CURRENT ROOM: " (get state "room")))
(println (get (get ROOMS (get state "room")) "desc"))
(println (string-append "INVENTORY: " (string-join (or (get state "inv") (list)) ", ")))
blocks.output:
[hall] north → → north
[hall] take key → Took key
[vault] east → → east

CURRENT ROOM: vault
A locked vault door. Exits: west.
INVENTORY: key

(define YOUR_COMMANDS (list "north" "take key" "east"))

(define ROOMS (dict
  "start" (dict "desc" "A cold stone antechamber. Exits: north."
                "exits" (dict "north" "hall"))
  "hall" (dict "desc" "A long hall. A rusted key lies on the floor. Exits: south, east."

                "exits" (dict "west" "hall"))
  "treasure" (dict "desc" "🏆 YOU FOUND THE TREASURE. Game won."

    ((string-prefix? "take " cmd)

    ((and (= cmd "unlock") (= room "vault") (member? "key" inv))

    (else (dict "room" room "inv" inv "msg" (string-append "Can't: " cmd)))))

(define state (dict "room" "start" "inv" (list)))
(define log (list))
(for-each (lambda (cmd)
  (set! state (step state cmd))
  (set! log (append log (list (string-append "[" (get state "room") "] " cmd " → " (get state "msg"))))))

(for-each println log)

(println (get (get ROOMS (get state "room")) "desc"))
(println (string-append "INVENTORY: " (string-join (or (get state "inv") (list)) ", ")))
